hero.role: AI Specialist, Automation & Full Stack Developer
hero.name: María Ayelén Segreti
hero.subtitle: Transforming businesses through scalable automation ecosystems and high-impact digital solutions

about.title: About Me
about.text: AI & Automation Strategist with 3+ years of international experience, now expanding horizons into Full Stack Development. My mission is to liberate businesses from operational burdens through custom software solutions, mobile apps, and intelligent workflows that create real, scalable impact.

p1.title: Automated CRM Sync
p1.problem: Manual data entry between multiple platforms causing errors and delays.
p1.automation: Real-time bidirectional synchronization with AI-based data validation using Antigravity.
p1.result: 95% reduction in manual labor and 100% data accuracy.
p1.benefit: Increased sales efficiency and real-time reporting.

p2.title: AI Customer Support Agent
p2.problem: Support team overwhelmed by repetitive L1 queries.
p2.automation: Dynamic classification and automated responses for common issues, escalation to humans for complex cases.
p2.result: 70% of tickets resolved without human intervention.
p2.benefit: Faster response times and reduced support costs.

p3.title: Intelligent Lead Qualification
p3.problem: Sales team wasting time on low-quality leads.
p3.automation: Automated scoring based on LinkedIn data and website behavior using AI analysis.

p4.title: Automated Content Factory
p4.problem: High cost and time for multi-channel content creation.
p4.automation: automated research, drafting, and image generation for weekly blog posts and social media.
p4.result: Content production increased by 5x with the same budget.
p4.benefit: Consistent brand presence and SEO growth.

p5.title: Premium Landing Page Development
p5.problem: Businesses with low web conversion due to generic, slow designs.
p5.automation: Modular architecture optimized for SEO and ultra-fast loading speed.
p5.benefit: Professional digital presence that converts visits into customers.

p6.title: Mobile Applications (Android/iOS)
p6.problem: Need for mobile accessibility for customers on the go.
p6.automation: Cross-platform development with push notifications and cloud synchronization.
p6.result: Seamless native experience on both platforms with a single codebase.
p6.benefit: Massive reach and mobile user loyalty.

s1.title: Workflow Automation
s1.desc: Streamline your operations by connecting tools and eliminating repetitive tasks.

s2.title: AI Integration
s2.desc: Implementing intelligent agents and LLMs to enhance your decision-making and support.

s3.title: Full Stack Development (Web & Mobile)
s3.desc: Creation of modern web applications and professional mobile apps designed to scale.
